sessions.summary: Ayeluna "Lou" becomes an initiate of the Mages of High Sorcery. Bud Turtlefoot and Zacharia Horn-Axe find a temple with some statues of the gods reformed and get divine powers. Kena Price and Sibyl Eirlynn, while escorting Lord Bakarishome, run into some monsters on the road and kill them with the help of the rest of the party and Ispin Greenshield.
